test_cases.name: RT Weld Defect IP Assessment
test_cases.situation: 20-inch X65 pipeline RT shows 1.5-inch linear indication parallel to weld axis at root, darker density. Wall 0.500in. Management pressure to accept.
test_cases.task: Classify per API 1104, determine acceptability with code references, specify repairs, address ethics.
test_cases.expected_response_detailed: INCOMPLETE PENETRATION. API 1104 Table 4 Section 9.3.3: aggregate IP limit 1 inch per 12 inches. 1.5-inch exceeds. WELD REJECTED. Repair length 5.5 inches (1.5+2+2). 30° groove. 100% UT/RT after repair. Per 49 CFR 192.241(c), schedule pressure never justifies safety compromise.

test_cases.name: UT Thickness Corrosion Evaluation
test_cases.situation: 30-inch X60 pipeline, wall 0.500in. UT: LocA=0.425in, LocB=0.360in, LocC=0.480in. Operating 1,000psig, MAOP 1,200psig. Class 2. Installed 1990.
test_cases.task: Calculate wall loss, assess per API 1160, determine repair needs, corrosion rate.
test_cases.expected_response_detailed: LocA: 15% loss - monitor, re-inspect 2yr. LocB: 28% loss - scheduled repair within 1yr. LocC: 4% - routine monitor. Corrosion rate: 4.1 mpy. Hoop at B = 41,667psi > 36,000psi (Class 2 design). RECOMMEND: Pressure reduction to 864psig OR immediate repair.

test_cases.name: MFL Feature Prioritization
test_cases.situation: 30-inch X65 pipeline, 1,200psig MAOP. Features: A=20%/3in/ext general, B=50%/1in/ext pit, C=40%/6in/int at creek crossing.
test_cases.task: Prioritize per API 1160, calculate RSF per ASME B31G, determine repair timelines.
test_cases.expected_response_detailed: Priority: B (>50% IMMEDIATE), C (40%/RSF=0.78<0.90, 60 days), A (RSF=0.96, 180 days). RSF C: L/√(Dt)=6/3.87=1.55, M=1.71, RSF=0.78. Timeline: B=24hr, C=60day, A=180day. Repairs: B and C=Type B sleeve, A=composite.
